59.reason: [This line incorrectly appends the new node at the end even when it should be inserted in sorted order. The loop condition stops before the last node, so if the new node is larger than all existing nodes, it's appended correctly, but if it should be inserted between the last and second-last, it fails. Also, if the new node is smaller than the first node, it's never handled.]

168.reason: [This loop condition skips the last node in the adjacency list, so if the vertex to delete is the last adjacent node, it won't be removed.]

170.reason: [This assignment is incorrect: 'p' is not necessarily pointing to the head; also, this block is inside a loop that starts from head, so reassigning g[i].link here is logically flawed.]
